bestWorks.title: PDF Upload and Collaborate WebApp
bestWorks.description: A real-time collaborative platform enabling users to upload, view, and interact on PDF documents. Designed for seamless sharing and collaboration with an intuitive UI.
features: Secure file upload and access control
bestWorks.challenges: Handling real-time collaboration and synchronization across multiple users efficiently

bestWorks.title: ChatBuddy
bestWorks.description: A real-time chat application with authentication and scalable backend. Supports seamless communication with optimized data handling and modern UI.
bestWorks.challenges: Ensuring low-latency real-time communication and handling concurrent users

bestWorks.title: Patient Management System
bestWorks.description: A distributed healthcare management system built with microservices architecture, enabling efficient patient record handling and real-time communication.
bestWorks.challenges: Designing a scalable distributed system with efficient inter-service communication

bestWorks.title: E-Commerce Shopping Web App
bestWorks.description: A full-stack e-commerce platform enabling users to browse products, manage carts, and securely complete purchases. Built with a focus on scalability, clean UI, and seamless user experience.
bestWorks.challenges: Designing scalable backend APIs and handling secure payment workflows while maintaining smooth frontend performance

bestWorks.title: Siamese Deep Facial Recognition Model
bestWorks.description: Developed a deep learning-based facial recognition system using Siamese Neural Networks to verify identity by comparing facial embeddings. The model learns similarity between image pairs rather than direct classification, enabling robust real-world recognition.
features: Siamese network architecture for face similarity detection
Real-time face detection and preprocessing using OpenCV
Embedding-based comparison instead of traditional classification
Custom dataset preparation and training pipeline
bestWorks.challenges: Training a robust similarity model with limited data and ensuring accurate face embeddings across varying lighting and angles

competitions.description: Qualified for regionals and competed in advanced algorithmic problem-solving under strict time constraints.
